title: coffea mannii
intro: Coffea mannii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Ethiopia and Sudan, and is a wild relative of the coffee plant. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and wounds. The health benefits of Coffea mannii include antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, as well as the ability to improve digestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Coffea mannii can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
